title: Light Luxurious Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A cultured and silky Uruguayan dish featuring fast action yeast and a mirepoix base, cooked to perfection on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the yeast mixture.
Thread the beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, grated carrot, and diced celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Brush the skewers with the vegetable mixture and place them on the cedar plank.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to the desired level of doneness.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
